title.en: Light as a Network: A Guided Tour of 802.15.13's General Description
title.zh: 用光组网：802.15.13 总体描述导览

blocks.en: IEEE Std 802.15.13-2023 is a standard for optical wireless communications (OWC) — sending data by flickering light sources such as light-emitting diodes (LEDs) and laser diodes far faster than the human eye can perceive. Clause 5 is the standard's "general description": the big-picture map before the detailed chapters. It introduces what these networks are made of, how they are arranged, how they coexist with other light-based systems, what a device looks like inside, and the two halves of the protocol stack — the medium access control (MAC) sublayer and the physical layer (PHY). This lesson is a reference-grade walkthrough that gives every subclause of Clause 5 a clear home (5.1 through 5.7.3).
blocks.zh: IEEE Std 802.15.13-2023 是一项光无线通信（OWC，optical wireless communications）标准——它通过让发光二极管（LED）和激光二极管等光源以远超人眼可感知速度闪烁来传输数据。第 5 章是该标准的“总体描述”：在进入细节章节之前先给出全局蓝图。它介绍了这类网络由什么组成、如何排布、如何与其他基于光的系统共存、设备内部长什么样，以及协议栈的两大部分——媒体接入控制（MAC，medium access control）子层和物理层（PHY，physical layer）。本课是一份参考级的逐节讲解，为第 5 章每个子节（5.1 至 5.7.3）都安排了清晰的归属。

blocks.en: 5.1 (Introduction) and 5.2 (Components) set the stage. Because light merges with lighting infrastructure — area lighting, signboards, streetlights, vehicles, traffic signals — these are "wireless specialty networks." The basic unit is an optical wireless personal area network (OWPAN): two or more conformant devices, each with a MAC implementation and a conformant PHY, each identified by an EUI-48 MAC address. When a device joins, it is allocated a 16-bit association identifier (AID). One special device — the coordinator (a "coordinator-capable device") — starts, maintains, and stops the OWPAN, and is involved in every data transmission. The others are members. Each OWPAN carries an OWPAN ID (a unique identifier) and a human-readable OWPAN name.
blocks.zh: 5.1（引言）和 5.2（组成）先搭好舞台。由于光能与照明基础设施融合——区域照明、广告牌、路灯、车辆、交通信号灯——这类网络属于“无线专用网络”。其基本单元是光无线个域网（OWPAN，optical wireless personal area network）：由两个或更多符合标准的设备组成，每个设备都有 MAC 实现和符合标准的 PHY，并以 EUI-48 MAC 地址标识。设备入网时会被分配一个 16 位的关联标识符（AID，association identifier）。其中一个特殊设备——协调器（coordinator，即“具备协调能力的设备”）——负责启动、维护和停止 OWPAN，并参与每一次数据传输。其余设备称为成员（member）。每个 OWPAN 都带有一个 OWPAN ID（唯一标识符）和一个人类可读的 OWPAN 名称。

blocks.en: 5.3 (Network topologies) starts from one logical shape and bends it into several physical ones. 5.3.1: every OWPAN is logically a star — the coordinator sits in the middle and relays all traffic, even between two members, and offers the MAC service at its MAC data service access point (MD-SAP). Networks stay independent by each picking an OWPAN ID nobody else is using in the coverage area. 5.3.2 (Distributed MIMO star) gives the coordinator several optical frontends (OFEs) so it can use multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) — the OFEs may be spread out in space and linked by fronthaul, yet members still see a single logical coordinator. 5.3.3 (Broadcast) is a degenerate case: the OWPAN is just the coordinator, transmitting to the broadcast address so any device can listen. 5.3.4 (Relay) adds a relay device that bridges the coordinator to a hard-to-reach relayed device when the relayed path beats the direct link.
blocks.zh: 5.3（网络拓扑）从一种逻辑形状出发，弯折成若干物理形状。5.3.1：每个 OWPAN 在逻辑上都是星形——协调器居于中心并转发所有流量（即使是两个成员之间的流量），并在其 MAC 数据服务接入点（MD-SAP，MAC data service access point）提供 MAC 服务。各网络通过在覆盖区内各自选取一个无人使用的 OWPAN ID 来保持独立。5.3.2（分布式 MIMO 星形）为协调器配备多个光前端（OFE，optical frontend），从而使用多输入多输出（MIMO，multiple-input multiple-output）——这些 OFE 可以在空间上分散并经前传链路相连，但成员看到的仍是单一逻辑协调器。5.3.3（广播）是退化情形：OWPAN 仅由协调器构成，向广播地址发送，任何设备都可收听。5.3.4（中继）增加一个中继设备，当经中继的路径优于直连时，把协调器桥接到难以直接到达的被中继设备。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 460 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="80" cy="60" r="18"/><text x="80" y="64" text-anchor="middle" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="11">C</text><circle cx="30" cy="120" r="12"/><circle cx="80" cy="140" r="12"/><circle cx="130" cy="120" r="12"/><line x1="80" y1="78" x2="32" y2="110"/><line x1="80" y1="78" x2="80" y2="128"/><line x1="80" y1="78" x2="128" y2="110"/><text x="80" y="185" text-anchor="middle" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="11">Star (5.3.1)</text><circle cx="320" cy="60" r="18"/><text x="320" y="64" text-anchor="middle" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="11">C</text><circle cx="380" cy="110" r="10"/><text x="380" y="114" text-anchor="middle" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="9">R</text><circle cx="380" cy="165" r="12"/><line x1="320" y1="78" x2="376" y2="102"/><line x1="380" y1="120" x2="380" y2="153"/><line x1="335" y1="72" x2="370" y2="158" stroke-dasharray="4 4"/><text x="320" y="185" text-anchor="middle" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="11">Relay (5.3.4)</text></svg>

caption.en: Left: the logical star (C = coordinator, all member traffic passes through it). Right: a relay topology where R bridges the coordinator to a member when the relayed path (solid) beats the weak direct link (dashed).
caption.zh: 左：逻辑星形（C = 协调器，所有成员流量都经它转发）。右：中继拓扑，当经中继的路径（实线）优于较弱的直连链路（虚线）时，R 把协调器桥接到某成员。

blocks.en: 5.4 (Coexistence) explains why light is a friendly neighbor. Light occupies an orthogonal part of the electromagnetic spectrum, so it does not interfere with radio; it stays inside the illuminated area (a few meters across) and its directivity limits leakage into neighboring networks. As an extra precaution, a coordinator only starts a new OWPAN if it detects no overlapping OWC networks (see 6.5.3). The clause then surveys neighbors in the light spectrum and concludes there is little to worry about: infrared remote controls and the IrDA family operate at lower frequencies or are obsolete; IEEE 802.15.7 mostly used incompatible modes; and overlap with ITU-T G.9991 or IEEE 802.11bb can be avoided by choosing non-overlapping optical wavelengths or by spatial separation.
blocks.zh: 5.4（共存）解释了为什么光是个友善的邻居。光占据电磁频谱中正交的一部分，因此不会干扰无线电；它被限制在被照亮的区域内（直径几米），其方向性也限制了向邻近网络的泄漏。作为额外的预防措施，协调器只有在未检测到重叠的 OWC 网络时才会启动新的 OWPAN（见 6.5.3）。该节随后综述了光谱中的“邻居”并得出几乎无需担忧的结论：红外遥控器和 IrDA 系列工作在更低频率或已过时；IEEE 802.15.7 多采用不兼容的模式；而与 ITU-T G.9991 或 IEEE 802.11bb 的重叠可通过选取不重叠的光波长或空间分隔来避免。

blocks.en: 5.5 (Device architecture) opens the box. 5.5.1: a device is built in layers, each offering services to the layer above through service access points (SAPs) built from primitives. A device management entity (DME) runs the device (and, for a coordinator, the OWPAN) and reaches MAC management functions via the MAC layer management entity (MLME) at the MLME-SAP. The MAC sublayer controls medium access for all transfers and offers two doors to the layer above: the MD-SAP, which moves MAC service data units (MSDUs) between peers (supporting the IEEE 802.1AC MAC service), and the MLME-SAP for management. The PHY holds the optical transceiver: it turns a PHY service data unit (PSDU) — which is just an MPDU handed down through the PHY data SAP (PD-SAP) — into a PHY protocol data unit (PPDU) for transmission, and is managed through the PLME-SAP. 5.5.2 (Dimming support) keeps illumination independent of communication: the receiver need not know the dimming level. 5.5.3 (Flicker mitigation) avoids visible flicker by modulating very fast with zero average change, using direct-current (DC)-free, balanced waveforms such as 8B10B line codes or DC-biased orthogonal frequency division multiplexing (OFDM) with a zero-amplitude DC subcarrier.
blocks.zh: 5.5（设备架构）打开盒子。5.5.1：设备按层构建，每层通过由原语构成的服务接入点（SAP，service access point）向上层提供服务。设备管理实体（DME，device management entity）负责管理设备（若为协调器还管理 OWPAN），并经 MLME-SAP 上的 MAC 层管理实体（MLME，MAC layer management entity）调用 MAC 管理功能。MAC 子层为所有传输控制媒体接入，并向上层提供两扇门：MD-SAP，用于在对等体之间搬运 MAC 服务数据单元（MSDU，MAC service data unit，支持 IEEE 802.1AC MAC 服务）；以及用于管理的 MLME-SAP。PHY 含光收发机：它把 PHY 服务数据单元（PSDU，PHY service data unit，即经 PHY 数据 SAP（PD-SAP）下传的 MPDU）转换成用于发送的 PHY 协议数据单元（PPDU），并通过 PLME-SAP 进行管理。5.5.2（调光支持）使照明与通信相互独立：接收机无需知道调光等级。5.5.3（闪烁抑制）通过以极高速度调制且平均变化为零来避免可见闪烁，采用无直流（DC）、围绕偏置平衡的波形，例如 8B10B 线路编码，或带零幅度直流子载波的直流偏置正交频分复用（OFDM，orthogonal frequency division multiplexing）。

blocks.en:
flowchart TD
  DME[DME] -->|MLME-SAP| MAC[MAC sublayer]
  NH[Higher layer] -->|MD-SAP| MAC
  MAC -->|PD-SAP| PHY[PHY]
  DME -->|PLME-SAP| PHY
  PHY --> OFE[OFE 1..N]
blocks.zh:
flowchart TD
  DME[DME] -->|MLME-SAP| MAC[MAC 子层]
  NH[更高层] -->|MD-SAP| MAC
  MAC -->|PD-SAP| PHY[PHY]
  DME -->|PLME-SAP| PHY
  PHY --> OFE[OFE 1..N]

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 460 120" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="20" y="20" width="110" height="30"/><text x="75" y="39" text-anchor="middle" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="11">MSDU</text><rect x="150" y="20" width="130" height="30"/><text x="215" y="39" text-anchor="middle" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="11">MPDU = PSDU</text><rect x="300" y="20" width="140" height="30"/><text x="370" y="39" text-anchor="middle" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="11">PPDU</text><line x1="130" y1="35" x2="150" y2="35"/><line x1="280" y1="35" x2="300" y2="35"/><text x="75" y="75" text-anchor="middle" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="9">higher layer</text><text x="215" y="75" text-anchor="middle" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="9">MAC sublayer</text><text x="370" y="75" text-anchor="middle" stroke="none" fill="currentColor" font-size="9">PHY → OFE</text></svg>

caption.en: How data units nest as they descend the stack (Clause 5.5): an MSDU becomes an MPDU, which the PHY treats as a PSDU and wraps into a PPDU for emission through an OFE.
caption.zh: 数据单元沿协议栈下行时如何层层封装（5.5 节）：MSDU 变成 MPDU，PHY 把它当作 PSDU 并封装成 PPDU，经 OFE 发射出去。

blocks.en: 5.6 (MAC sublayer overview) is the busiest section. 5.6.1 (General) notes the optical medium's quirks: light does not pass through opaque walls, and a blocked line-of-sight makes signals far weaker. 5.6.2 (Data transfer model): there are exactly two transactions — to the coordinator (a member sends) and from the coordinator (a member receives); member-to-member traffic is delivered via the coordinator, which bridges using IEEE 802.1Q, and deterministic schedules carry real-time streams. 5.6.3 (Data transfer through a relay) lets a relay device report its neighborhood so the coordinator can route via the relay when that improves throughput. 5.6.4 (Adaptive transmission) supports multiple bandwidths and variable modulation and coding to track changing channels. 5.6.5 (MAC frames): a single MPDU format carries elements, and there are three frame types — data, management, and control. 5.6.6 (Medium access mechanism): scheduled access splits coordinator-allocated channel time into guaranteed time slices (GTS, deterministic) and random time slices (RTS, e.g. for association); polled access uses a random access polling period (RAPP) and a dedicated polling period (DPP). 5.6.7 (Acknowledgment and retransmission): an optional acknowledgment confirms reception; missing it past a timeout triggers retransmission. 5.6.8 (Data verification): a cyclic redundancy check (CRC) detects corruption. 5.6.9 (Security): not defined here — it is left to higher layers.
blocks.zh: 5.6（MAC 子层概述）是最繁忙的一节。5.6.1（一般）指出光媒体的特点：光不能穿过不透明的墙，视距被遮挡时信号会弱得多。5.6.2（数据传输模型）：恰好有两类事务——发往协调器（成员发送）和来自协调器（成员接收）；成员到成员的流量经协调器转交，协调器用 IEEE 802.1Q 进行桥接，确定性调度则承载实时流。5.6.3（经中继设备的数据传输）让中继设备报告其邻域，使协调器可在能提升吞吐时经中继转发。5.6.4（自适应传输）支持多种带宽以及可变的调制与编码以跟踪变化的信道。5.6.5（MAC 帧）：单一的 MPDU 格式承载各类元素，共有三种帧类型——数据帧、管理帧、控制帧。5.6.6（媒体接入机制）：调度式接入把协调器分配的信道时间分为保证时隙（GTS，guaranteed time slice，确定性）和随机时隙（RTS，random time slice，如用于关联）；轮询式接入则使用随机接入轮询期（RAPP）和专用轮询期（DPP）。5.6.7（确认与重传）：可选的确认用于确认接收；超时未收到则触发重传。5.6.8（数据校验）：用循环冗余校验（CRC，cyclic redundancy check）检测损坏。5.6.9（安全）：本标准未定义安全机制，交由更高层处理。

blocks.en: Two ways to take turns on the light: scheduled access (the coordinator hands out GTS for guaranteed, deterministic slots and RTS for ad-hoc requests like joining) versus polled access (the coordinator asks members in turn — random requests in the RAPP, contention-free turns in the DPP). Both keep the single coordinator firmly in charge of who lights up when.
blocks.zh: 在光上轮流发言有两种方式：调度式接入（协调器分发 GTS 用于有保证的确定性时隙，分发 RTS 用于入网等临时请求），以及轮询式接入（协调器依次询问成员——RAPP 用于随机请求，DPP 用于无竞争的发言机会）。两种方式都让唯一的协调器牢牢掌控谁在何时点亮。

blocks.en: 5.7 (Physical layer overview) closes Clause 5 with the two PHYs. 5.7.1 (Overview) lists them: the pulsed modulation PHY (PM-PHY) and the high bandwidth PHY (HB-PHY). 5.7.2 (PM-PHY introduction), specified in Clause 10, targets moderate rates (~9 Mb/s to ~100 Mb/s), low power, and low latency for mobile and Internet of Things (IoT) use; its trick is a high clock rate with low spectral efficiency, using binary pulse-amplitude modulation (2-PAM) with 8B10B line coding plus Reed-Solomon (RS) forward error correction (FEC). 5.7.3 (HB-PHY introduction), specified in Clause 11, targets very high rates (23 Mb/s to 2.192 Gb/s) by pairing high bandwidth with high spectral efficiency, using DC-biased OFDM with adaptive bitloading (quadrature amplitude modulation, QAM, with variable constellation sizes) and low-density parity-check (LDPC) codes for FEC. Both PHYs can estimate the channel impulse response of multiple LEDs at once and support MIMO via multiple OFEs.
blocks.zh: 5.7（物理层概述）以两种 PHY 收尾第 5 章。5.7.1（概述）列出它们：脉冲调制 PHY（PM-PHY，pulsed modulation PHY）和高带宽 PHY（HB-PHY，high bandwidth PHY）。5.7.2（PM-PHY 引言）在第 10 章规定，面向中等速率（约 9 Mb/s 至约 100 Mb/s）、低功耗和低时延，适用于移动和物联网（IoT，Internet of Things）场景；其诀窍是采用高时钟速率配低频谱效率，使用带 8B10B 线路编码的二进制脉冲幅度调制（2-PAM）并辅以里德-所罗门（RS，Reed-Solomon）前向纠错（FEC，forward error correction）。5.7.3（HB-PHY 引言）在第 11 章规定，面向极高速率（23 Mb/s 至 2.192 Gb/s），通过把高带宽与高频谱效率结合实现，使用带自适应比特加载的直流偏置 OFDM（正交幅度调制 QAM，可变星座大小）并以低密度奇偶校验（LDPC，low-density parity-check）码作 FEC。两种 PHY 都能同时估计多个 LED 的信道冲激响应，并经多个 OFE 支持 MIMO。

summary.en: Coverage map: every Clause 5 subclause and where it lives
summary.zh: 覆盖图：第 5 章每个子节及其所在位置

blocks.en: Topologies (5.3): 5.3.1 Logical topology = always a star, coordinator relays all traffic, offers the MD-SAP; 5.3.2 Distributed MIMO star = multiple OFEs, possibly fronthaul-linked, members see one logical coordinator; 5.3.3 Broadcast = OWPAN is just the coordinator sending to the broadcast address; 5.3.4 Relay = a relay device bridges to a relayed device when better than the direct link. Device architecture (5.5): 5.5.1 Overview = layered SAP model (DME, MLME-SAP, MD-SAP, PD-SAP, PLME-SAP; MSDU→MPDU/PSDU→PPDU); 5.5.2 Dimming support = illumination independent of comms; 5.5.3 Flicker mitigation = fast, DC-free balanced waveforms (8B10B, DC-biased OFDM). MAC overview (5.6): 5.6.1 General = optical medium quirks; 5.6.2 Data transfer model = to/from coordinator, member-to-member bridged via 802.1Q; 5.6.3 Relay transfer = relay reports neighborhood; 5.6.4 Adaptive transmission = variable bandwidth/modulation/coding; 5.6.5 MAC frames = one MPDU format, three types (data/management/control); 5.6.6 Medium access = scheduled (GTS + RTS) and polled (RAPP + DPP); 5.6.7 Ack/retransmission = optional ack, timeout-driven retransmit; 5.6.8 Data verification = CRC; 5.6.9 Security = deferred to higher layers. PHY overview (5.7): 5.7.1 lists PM-PHY and HB-PHY; 5.7.2 PM-PHY = ~9–100 Mb/s, 2-PAM + 8B10B + RS, Clause 10; 5.7.3 HB-PHY = 23 Mb/s–2.192 Gb/s, DC-biased OFDM + QAM bitloading + LDPC, Clause 11.
blocks.zh: 拓扑（5.3）：5.3.1 逻辑拓扑＝始终为星形，协调器转发所有流量并提供 MD-SAP；5.3.2 分布式 MIMO 星形＝多个 OFE，可经前传相连，成员只见单一逻辑协调器；5.3.3 广播＝OWPAN 仅含协调器，发往广播地址；5.3.4 中继＝当优于直连时由中继设备桥接到被中继设备。设备架构（5.5）：5.5.1 概述＝分层 SAP 模型（DME、MLME-SAP、MD-SAP、PD-SAP、PLME-SAP；MSDU→MPDU/PSDU→PPDU）；5.5.2 调光支持＝照明与通信相互独立；5.5.3 闪烁抑制＝快速、无直流、平衡波形（8B10B、直流偏置 OFDM）。MAC 概述（5.6）：5.6.1 一般＝光媒体特点；5.6.2 数据传输模型＝发往/来自协调器，成员间经 802.1Q 桥接；5.6.3 中继传输＝中继报告邻域；5.6.4 自适应传输＝可变带宽/调制/编码；5.6.5 MAC 帧＝单一 MPDU 格式，三种类型（数据/管理/控制）；5.6.6 媒体接入＝调度式（GTS＋RTS）与轮询式（RAPP＋DPP）；5.6.7 确认/重传＝可选确认，超时重传；5.6.8 数据校验＝CRC；5.6.9 安全＝交由更高层。PHY 概述（5.7）：5.7.1 列出 PM-PHY 与 HB-PHY；5.7.2 PM-PHY＝约 9–100 Mb/s，2-PAM＋8B10B＋RS，第 10 章；5.7.3 HB-PHY＝23 Mb/s–2.192 Gb/s，直流偏置 OFDM＋QAM 比特加载＋LDPC，第 11 章。

cites.note: Clause 5 (General description) in full: 5.1 Introduction and 5.2 Components (p.23-24); 5.3 Network topologies incl. logical star, distributed MIMO, broadcast, relay (p.24-26); 5.4 Coexistence (p.27); 5.5 Device architecture, dimming, flicker (p.27-29); 5.6 MAC sublayer overview (p.29-31); 5.7 Physical layer overview, PM-PHY and HB-PHY (p.31-32).
